overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a dark, rainy forest. The character traverses a misty woodland path, crosses a wooden bridge over a stream, and encounters NPCs near a settlement.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow forest path surrounded by tall pines in heavy rain

entered.detail: tall evergreen coniferous trees forming dense forest canopy on both sides of the path
narrow dirt trail winding through the forest with patches of grass and mud
dense shrubs and ferns lining the sides of the forest path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt walking through a dense, dark forest during a heavy rainstorm. Tall pine trees flank both sides of the narrow dirt path, creating an enclosed and atmospheric environment with limited visibility due to mist and darkness.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky stream valley with sun breaking through

events.description: character turns around revealing bright sunlight breaking through the storm clouds and mist

agents.ego_description: turns toward the direction of the sunlight and continues walking along the stream bank

entered.detail: flowing water stream running parallel to the forest path with rocky banks
rocky outcrops and stone formations scattered along the path edges
mountain silhouette visible through the mist in the background

segments.scene_description: As the character turns, the scene opens up to reveal sunlight piercing through the storm clouds, illuminating a rocky stream valley. The path continues alongside the flowing water with distant mountains visible through the hazy atmosphere.

events.description: character steps onto and crosses a wooden footbridge over the flowing stream

agents.ego_description: carefully crossing the wooden footbridge over the flowing stream water

entered.detail: weathered wooden plank bridge with railings spanning the stream
flowing water visible beneath the bridge planks
rough wooden fence posts lining the path beyond the bridge

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and crosses a wooden footbridge over the stream, transitioning from the rocky bank to a fenced path on the other side. The bridge planks are weathered and the water flows beneath as the character continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest path approaching settlement with NPCs

events.description: group of NPC villagers come into view standing and walking along the path ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the path approaching and passing by villagers gathered near the settlement

notable_agents.action: villager standing by the wooden fence watching the character approach
villager walking along the path in the same direction as the character

entered.detail: rough wooden barriers and fence posts marking the settlement boundary
warm orange light source visible through the trees indicating a camp or building

segments.scene_description: The path opens into a clearing where several NPC villagers are gathered near wooden barricades. The character walks among them, approaching what appears to be a small settlement or camp with a warm light visible in the distance through the rainy forest.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark, rain-drenched forest that gradually opens into a sunlit valley and a small settlement. It begins with Geralt traversing a narrow dirt path enclosed by towering pine trees and thick mist, where visibility is limited by the heavy storm. As the character turns, the oppressive canopy gives way to a rocky stream valley where sunlight pierces through the clouds to illuminate the flowing water and distant mountains. The camera then follows him across a weathered wooden footbridge, transitioning from the rocky banks to a fenced trail. Finally, the path expands into a clearing where the character walks among villagers gathered near wooden barricades, moving toward the warm light of a distant camp.
